name: Ranchero Roll-Ups
recipeIngredient: 14.5 oz can diced tomatoes with green pepper and onion
4 oz can diced green chilies, drained
1 cup low-fat Monterey Jack cheese, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chicken, diced tomatoes, salsa, chilies, and onions in a skillet. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
2. Wrap each tortilla in plastic wrap and heat in the microwave for 1 minute or until hot.
3. Spoon about one-quarter of the chicken mixture down the center of each tortilla.
4. Top with about one-quarter cup of cheese.
5. Roll up each tortilla tightly and serve.
